rewritten_requirements: The system shall request donors to enter device details.
The system shall request the address details of the donor.
The system shall verify device details by the admin.
The system shall assign collected devices to a pickup executive.
The system shall allow volunteers to join the team.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Request donors to enter device details
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: This system requests the donors to enter the details regarding the device they are willing to donate.
It also requests the address details of the donor in order to reach them.
The admin has to verify the details of the device

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Assign collected devices to pickup executive
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: assign it to a pickup executive for collection.
This system also allows the volunteers to join the team
